  "feedback": "The primary failure lies in using incorrect agent names, rendering all orders incomprehensible and unexecutable for the actual team members.",
  "team_action": "The team stands confused and motionless, each agent waiting for a callsign that never arrives. The critical initial moments of the heist tick by, leaving the objectives untouched and the police outside gaining confidence.",
